uplight.renderIntent: Narrow-to-medium upward cone with realistic falloff and texture grazing on vertical surfaces.

downlight.renderIntent: Downward cone from elevated mount point with soft ground wash and natural shadowing.

path_light.renderIntent: Compact, low-height radial pool on ground with short throw and gentle edge feathering.

spot.renderIntent: Tight, focused cone highlighting a specific architectural or landscape focal point.

wall_wash.renderIntent: Wide, even vertical wash with soft transitions and controlled overlap between adjacent fixtures.

well_light.renderIntent: In-grade upward beam originating flush with hardscape or soil, clean source point with minimal fixture visibility.

bollard.renderIntent: Omnidirectional low-level path illumination with contained circular spread and no excessive glare.

step_light.renderIntent: Short horizontal wash across tread/riser surfaces to define steps without hotspot blowout.

gutter_uplight.renderIntent: Line-mounted directional uplight creating narrow vertical cones up roofline features.

coredrill.renderIntent: Flush-mounted in-surface source emitting a tight upward accent beam with realistic concrete interaction.

flood.renderIntent: Broad cone for larger coverage with gentle overlap and controlled brightness rolloff.
